examples: They flung themselves down on the sward [turf], close to their underground home.
Light grazing or over grazing lead to deteriorative succession of artificial sward.
The effect of 6 grazing intensities on growth of yak and the secondary productivity of sward was studied.
Runco's cutting edge sward didn't stop there as they have this new projector screen-mask that when paired with the proper equipment and lens on Runco projectors can display any aspect ratio.
